title: bothrocaryum alternifolium
intro: Bothrocaryum alternifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the Mexican poppy. This plant has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Bothrocaryum alternifolium include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Bothrocaryum alternifolium can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
